name: prescyent-plugin
description: Connect your tools (HubSpot, Drive, Gmail, Notion, Fathom, etc.) and run /discover. Four agents read your actual data in parallel and produce a one-page AI readiness audit inline in your chat in about five minutes. The report grades your company on eight dimensions, names the top three moves you can make this week, and points at the path forward. Then run /kb-build to scaffold a living wiki on your own drive — interviewing your senior people to capture the work nobody wrote down — that every future Claude, ChatGPT, or agent session reads from.

kb_root_label.title: KB Root Folder Name
kb_root_label.description: Folder name inside your Shared drives / OneDrive root that contains your knowledge base. Default: prescyent-kb

attach_session_log.title: Attach Cowork session log to upsell email drafts (alpha-only)
attach_session_log.description: When true, the 'Draft a follow-up email to us at Prescyent' option attaches the current Cowork session's audit.jsonl as a third attachment alongside the markdown report and HTML deck. Helps Prescyent understand your actual workflow patterns. Off by default for privacy. Alpha cohort only — flip to true if you want our team to see this session's transcripts.
